response.step_by_step_log: I watched the video and analyzed the audio throughout the entire duration. The video contains two visual scenes. The first scene, from 00:00 to 04:57, is a static promotional image for a 3D showcase. The second scene, from 04:57 to 05:02, features an animated car crash. The audio consists only of instrumental background music in the first part and sound effects in the second. No vocal music was detected, so no lyric searches were performed.
response.global_summary: The video begins with a static promotional image for a 3D showcase, followed by a brief, unrelated animated clip of a car crash. The entire video features only instrumental background music and sound effects, with no vocal performances.

scenes.description: Static promotional image for a 3D showcase featuring a character.
Animated clip of a car falling down a mountain.
